title: TMDB Movie Reviews Sentiment Analyzer
description: FastAPI app that fetches real TMDb movie reviews and classifies them with a RoBERTa sentiment model via the Hugging Face Inference API.
problem: Gauging audience sentiment on a movie meant manually reading through dozens of scattered reviews.
solution: Fetches TMDb reviews, classifies them with a RoBERTa model via the Hugging Face Inference API, and computes a confidence-weighted sentiment score.
challenges: Handled Hugging Face cold starts with retries and combined 3-class predictions into a single sentiment score.
results: Deployed on Vercel with async processing and in-memory caching for faster repeat searches.

title: Crop Disease Prediction
description: Deep learning model to detect crop diseases from leaf images, helping farmers act early.
problem: Manual identification of crop disease is slow and error-prone, leading to crop loss.
solution: Trained a CNN on leaf-image datasets, served via a lightweight inference API for field use.
challenges: Class imbalance across disease types; handled via augmentation and weighted loss.
results: Achieved 96% validation accuracy across 14 disease classes.

title: Credit Card Fraud Detection
description: ML pipeline to identify fraudulent transactions in highly imbalanced financial data.
problem: Fraud cases form <0.2% of transactions; naive models miss them entirely.
solution: Combined SMOTE oversampling with XGBoost and threshold tuning to maximize recall.
challenges: Balancing recall vs false positives without flooding analysts with alerts.
results: Recall of 0.93 at precision 0.88 on hold-out set.

title: Health Insurance Claim Analysis
description: Analyzed claim trends and built predictive models to estimate risk and payout amounts.
problem: Stakeholders lacked visibility into claim drivers and regional cost trends.
solution: Built a Power BI dashboard backed by SQL views plus a regression model for claim amounts.
challenges: Reconciling messy multi-source data into a consistent schema.
results: Reduced reporting cycle from weekly to real-time.

title: Customer Segmentation System
description: Segmented customer base using clustering to power targeted marketing campaigns.
problem: Marketing was using one-size-fits-all messaging with poor conversion.
solution: RFM features + K-Means clustering with silhouette-driven cluster selection.
challenges: Choosing interpretable cluster counts for non-technical stakeholders.
results: Lifted campaign CTR by 31% in pilot.

title: RAG Knowledge Assistant
description: Retrieval-augmented LLM assistant over private docs with citation-grounded answers.
problem: Teams couldn't quickly find answers buried inside hundreds of internal documents.
solution: Chunked + embedded docs into FAISS; LangChain orchestrates retrieval + answer with citations.
challenges: Chunking strategy and hallucination control on edge questions.
results: Cut average answer-finding time from ~8 min to <30 sec.

title: Spotify Music Analytics Dashboard using Power BI
description: Interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing Spotify listening trends, artist popularity, genres, albums, and user engagement through rich visualizations.
problem: Raw Spotify datasets made it difficult to uncover meaningful listening patterns and music trends.
solution: Designed an interactive Power BI dashboard with dynamic filters, KPIs, charts, and drill-down capabilities to explore music insights.
challenges: Cleaning inconsistent music metadata and designing intuitive visualizations for multiple analytical perspectives.
results: Delivered an interactive dashboard enabling quick exploration of artists, genres, tracks, and listening behavior.

title: IPL Performance & Trends Dashboard using Power BI
description: Comprehensive Power BI dashboard providing insights into IPL team performance, player statistics, match outcomes, and season-wise trends.
problem: Large IPL datasets made it difficult to identify long-term team and player performance trends.
solution: Built an interactive Power BI dashboard featuring KPIs, slicers, custom measures, and visual analytics for season-wise comparisons.
challenges: Combining historical IPL datasets and creating meaningful performance metrics across multiple seasons.
results: Produced an insightful dashboard enabling quick analysis of teams, players, venues, and tournament trends.

title: Crime Data Analysis Dashboard using Python, Tableau and SQL
description: End-to-end crime analytics project combining SQL, Python, and Tableau to uncover crime patterns, hotspots, temporal trends, and actionable insights.
problem: Crime records were scattered across large datasets, making trend analysis and hotspot identification difficult.
solution: Processed and analyzed crime data using SQL and Python before building an interactive Tableau dashboard for exploratory analysis.
challenges: Handling missing data, ensuring data consistency, and designing visualizations that clearly communicated crime patterns.
results: Created an interactive analytical dashboard that highlights crime hotspots, seasonal trends, and key crime statistics for data-driven decision-making.
